zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl於1404年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親Sir Henry de Percy25歲，母親Elizabeth Bardolph30歲。她於1429年與Thomas de Burgh在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1455年9月28日在英國諾圖波藍德享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl于1404年出生在苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Percy25岁，母亲Elizabeth Bardolph30岁。她于1429年与Thomas de Burgh在苏格兰培爾阿爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1455年9月28日在英国諾圖波藍德享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl was born in 1404, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Henry de Percy, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Bardolph, was 30. She married Thomas de Burgh in 1429, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 28 September 1455, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl est née en 1404, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Henry de Percy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bardolph, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Burgh en 1429, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 septembre 1455, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl 1404 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Percy 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bardolph 30. Sie hat 1429 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland Thomas de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 28. September 1455 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl è nata il nel 1404 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Henry de Percy, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Bardolph, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Burgh nel 1429, nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 28 settembre 1455, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Percy Lady of Athollが1404年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Percyは25歳，母Elizabeth Bardolphは30歳であった。1429年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルでThomas de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1455年9月28日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl(이)가 1404년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Percy(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bardolph(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1429년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 Thomas de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 9월 28일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl nasceu em 1404, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Henry de Percy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bardolph, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Burgh em 1429, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1455, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl родилась в 1404 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Percy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bardolph, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Burgh в 1429 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 28 сентября 1455 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Percy Lady of Atholl nació en 1404, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Henry de Percy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bardolph, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas de Burgh en 1429, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1455, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
